nasb.text: It will come about in all the land,” Declares the Lord, “That two parts in it will be cut off and perish; But the third will be left in it.

esv.text: In the whole land, declares the Lord, two thirds shall be cut off and perish, and one third shall be left alive.

cnv.text: 全地的人必有三分之二被除滅， 只有三分之一存留下來。

ccb.text: 地上三分之二的人必遭铲除、毁灭， 只剩下三分之一的人存活。 这是耶和华说的。
